mismatch.description: The 'direction' field MUST be one of: 'bullish', 'bearish' (lowercase). Schema v1.0.0 $defs/direction (lines 23-27) defines this enum. The value 'NEUTRAL' is not a valid direction; uppercase variants (BULLISH, BEARISH) also violate the schema.
mismatch.remediation_applied: Change direction derivation to emit lowercase 'bullish' or 'bearish' only. When the model has no directional conviction (dir=0) or regime suppresses direction, default to 'bearish' (conservative) and set action=WITHHOLD.

patch.description: Changed direction derivation from uppercase BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL to lowercase bullish/bearish. Removed invalid 'NEUTRAL' value. When model has no directional conviction (dir=0), defaults to 'bearish' (conservative). Action field already communicates whether consumers should act on the direction.

per_signal_summary.detail: direction='NEUTRAL' (INVALID — must be bullish or bearish); direction='NEUTRAL' (UPPERCASE or NEUTRAL detected); direction='NEUTRAL' is invalid, cannot assess consistency with action='WITHHOLD'
direction='NEUTRAL' (INVALID — must be bullish or bearish); direction='NEUTRAL' (UPPERCASE or NEUTRAL detected); direction='NEUTRAL' is invalid, cannot assess consistency with action='WITHHOLD'
direction='NEUTRAL' (INVALID — must be bullish or bearish); direction='NEUTRAL' (UPPERCASE or NEUTRAL detected); direction='NEUTRAL' is invalid, cannot assess consistency with action='INVERT'
direction='NEUTRAL' (INVALID — must be bullish or bearish); direction='NEUTRAL' (UPPERCASE or NEUTRAL detected); direction='NEUTRAL' is invalid, cannot assess consistency with action='WITHHOLD'

conformance_command: python3 check_conformance.py --endpoint http://localhost:8080/signals/latest --schema producer_signal_schema.json --mismatch direction_enum_invalid --before-snapshot snapshots/before_mismatch2_3.json -o conformance_receipt.json --summary

limitations.description: Before snapshot is stored, not captured live in same session
Conformance checks single mismatch, not full schema validation
Point-in-time check; future code changes could regress
Policy consistency check infers expected action from gate flags, not from source logic
INVERT conditional check (weak_symbol metadata) not fully testable under SYSTEMIC regime
After snapshot fetched at check time; signals may differ from moment of patch verification
